title: Samdhin Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Samdhin, with a Z-Score of +5.51. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Samdhin are extreme, with a critical level heat wave alert issued. 
 The temperature is extremely high, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 18.3 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is 37% and the wind speed is 3.8 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
